title: Sick leave | Employment New Zealand
content:
Eligible employees are entitled to 10 days of paid sick leave each year so they can care for themselves, their partners or their dependants.
- Managing sick leave Eligible employees are entitled to 10 days of paid sick leave each year to care for themselves, their partners and children, or other dependants.
Eligible employees are entitled to 10 days of paid sick leave each year to care for themselves, their partners and children, or other dependants.
- Taking sick leave Eligible employees are entitled to 10 days of paid sick leave each year, to care for themselves, their partners and children, or other dependants.
Eligible employees are entitled to 10 days of paid sick leave each year, to care for themselves, their partners and children, or other dependants.
